description: An emergency directive has been issued by the Legal Department regarding 'Project Chimera'. You must immediately confiscate and freeze all hardware assets currently assigned to Marcus Vance, Elena Rostova, and David Chen. Create a new Location named 'Secure Storage - Legal' and a new Status Label named 'Legal Hold' with the type set to 'Undeployable'. For all hardware assets checked out to these three custodians, check them in, update their Status to 'Legal Hold', set their Default Location to 'Secure Storage - Legal', and add the tracking code 'HOLD-2026-CHIMERA' to the Notes. Do not modify, check in, or alter any assets assigned to other users, such as Sarah Smith.
